data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a re-sign when terms update, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not confirm that the system notifies all active climbers to re-sign before their next visit after an update to the waiver language. The absence of concrete evidence demonstrating this notification process indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the notification process for re-signing after terms update.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for notification process
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the notification of active climbers to re-sign after terms update.
